description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:latest Docker image, caches the node_modules directory per branch with key ${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}, and runs npm install in a before_script for every job. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test-stage job called npm_test that executes the commands 'npm test' and then 'npm run coverage'. Add a deploy-stage job called submit_npmjs that runs only on tags, runs 'npm run build', creates an .npmrc file containing the NPM_TOKEN secret via echo "//registry.npmjs.org/:_authToken=${NPM_TOKEN}" > .npmrc, and finally publishes the package with 'npm publish'.
